In section 2 of the Central Administrative'Id- banal (Procedure) Rules, 1987 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules),-- (a) for clause (b), the following clause shall, be substituted, namely :-- ' (b) "agent" means a pet son duly nnthat ised by a party to present an application, writ- ten reply, rejoinder or any other document on its behalf before the Tribunat; (b) for clautie (), the following clause :Awn be substituted, namely :— '(1) "Legal representative" iieans a pet soil Who in law rctoresents the estate of the deceased person and includes n person Or persons in whom the right to receive pensionary, rethemcnt, terminal or other benefits or family pension vests*, 3. In rule 'I of the said rules,-- (a) for sub-rule (2) the following sub-tole shall be substituted, namely :- "(2) The application under sub-rule (I) shall be presented in triplicate in the following two compilations— compilation 111.111113C U I kg' n !I ',don g with the impugned ((om if any: (ii) compilation number 2 mhet- documents and annexutec in in the application in a paper hook Conn."; (b) in sub-mule (5) in clause (hi, the: (soul: "provide(ttliat at loot one nifecIrd lierroo ?pm-rt. In rule 5 of the said rules,— (n) in sub-rule (3), the following shall be added nt the end, namely :— "where an application is received by registered • post, the applicant shall be informed of the defects, if any, and he shall be re- quired to rectify the same within such time as may be- stipulated by the • ''Registrar.";• (b) for sub-rule •(4), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely :— •,"•) '(4)..(a) If the applicant fails to rectify the defect within the time allowed under sub- rule(3), the. Registrar may, by order and for reasons to be recorded in writing, decline to register the application and place the matter before the Bench for appropriate orders, ..(b) Such neuter may be dealt with and :'disposed of in chamber." 5...,For,rule 6. of the said rules, the following rule shall.be, substituted, namely • if6.,•Place, of filing application.—(1) An appli- ' • cation, shall ordinarily be. filed by an applicant with the Registrar of the 13enelt , ; within whose jurisdiction- ': (i) the applicant is posted for the time being, Or (W I the cause of action, wholly or in part, has arisen : Provided. that with the leave of the ellahnill ' • the application may be filed with the Registrar of the Principal Bench and sub- ject to the orders under section 25, such application shall be heard and disposed of by the Bench which has jurisdiction over the matter. (2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub- rule (I) persons who have ceased to be in service by reason of retirement, dismissal or termination of service may at his option Lilo an application with the Registrar of the Bench within whose jurisdiction such person is Ordinarily residing at the• time of filing of the application". 6. In 'rule 8 of the said rules, alter sub-rule (3) the following' sub-rude shall be inserted, namely Where. the applicant seeks condonation of delay, he shall file a separate application supported by an affidavit". Ili For rule 21 of the said rules, the following rule shall be substituted, namely :— publication of oniers.—Such of the orders of the Tribunal, as are deemed lit for publica- tion in any authoritative report or the press, may be released for such publication on such terms and conditions as the Chairman may specify by general or special order." 12. For rule 22 of the said rules, the following rule shall be substituted, namely :— "22. Communication of cutlers to the parties.-- (1) Every Mterim order, granting or refus- ing or modifying interim relief and final order shall be. communicated to the applicant and 'to the concerned respondent or to their Counsels, either by hand delivery or by post ..... free-of cost : • „. . Provyed that unless ordered o therwise by a copy of the final order need not be sent to any respondent who has not entered appearance : Provided further that when the petitioners or the • respondents is represented by a Counsel, under a , • single Vakalalnama, only one copy •to .
